shell.title: Household Asset and Commitment Tracker
shell.exportBackupSuccess: Backup download started. Check your downloads folder.
shell.exportBackupSuccessInline: Backup is ready and download has started.
shell.exportBackupSuccessAdminAll: Export complete for all users. Actor: {{actor}} | Lens: All users.
shell.exportBackupLongRunning: Still working on your backup. Keep this page open.
shell.exportBackupError: Export failed. Check your connection and session, then try again.
shell.exportBackupErrorNetwork: Export failed. Check your connection and retry.
shell.exportBackupErrorSession: Session expired before export finished. Sign in again, then retry.
shell.exportBackupErrorServer: Export failed on the server. Wait a moment, then retry.
shell.exportBackupErrorEscalated: Still failing after retries. Refresh your session, then retry. If it persists, contact support.

safety.policyDenied: Write blocked by ownership policy. You can only access your own records.
safety.invalidLens: Write blocked. Select a valid Lens user before trying again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your HACT account to continue.
login.topError: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
login.inlineError: Email and password are required for sign-in.
login.cooldown: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register with email and password.
register.topError: Registration failed. Please review your details and try again.

sessionExpired.title: Session expired
sessionExpired.body: Your session ended. Redirecting to sign in so you can continue where you left off.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review current position first, then move straight into urgent obligations and the latest completed changes.
dashboard.loadError: Dashboard data could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
dashboard.assetsEmpty: No assets yet. Add a property or vehicle to build your portfolio view.
dashboard.noDueEventsDescription: Add your first asset or commitment to unlock due-first planning on this dashboard.

currentPosition.title: Current position
currentPosition.description: High-level signals stay in one priority band so the page answers where things stand before it asks for action.

needsAttention.title: Needs Attention
needsAttention.description: Overdue rows land first, then due-soon obligations, so the main work queue stays easy to scan.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.description: A calmer companion feed keeps the latest completions and manual overrides nearby without competing with the queue.

exceptionNotices.title: Exceptions and notices
exceptionNotices.description: Keep unusual conditions visible in a calm side panel so the main queue stays focused on execution.

portfolio.description: Supporting portfolio context sits beside the main queue so item health and linked obligations stay visible together.

attention.emptyForFilter: No rows match this filter right now.

portfolio.clearLinkedRows: No overdue linked rows for this asset right now.

overdue.description: {{count}} overdue rows are still active in {{period}}, touching {{assetCount}} portfolio assets.

manualOverride.title: Manual overrides in period
manualOverride.description_one: {{count}} completed row landed through a manual override in {{period}}.
manualOverride.description_other: {{count}} completed rows landed through manual overrides in {{period}}.

clear.title: No unusual dashboard exceptions
clear.description: No manual overrides or overdue-linked asset spikes are active in {{period}}.

activityTrendStrip.title: Period activity trend
activityTrendStrip.description: Use the active-period counts to read open pressure and closeout pace before scanning the audit log for detail in {{period}}.

overdue.label: Overdue pressure
overdue.hintClear: No overdue rows are still open in {{period}}.

upcoming.label: Upcoming this period
upcoming.hintClear: No more upcoming rows are due in {{period}}.

completed.label: Completed this period
completed.hintClear: No completed rows have landed in {{period}} yet.

recentActivity.empty: Completed events will appear here once activity starts landing in history.

events.loadError: Events could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
events.title: Events ledger
events.subtitle: Resolve upcoming obligations inline, then trust the ledger to move paid rows into calm, grouped history.
events.tabHint: Mark paid directly inside Upcoming, then switch to History to review completed rows by month.
events.noPendingDescription: You are caught up. Add a new item to generate upcoming timeline obligations.

groups.thisWeekHint: Rolling 7-day window: today plus the next 6 calendar days.

empty.title: Nothing pressing right now.
empty.description: Upcoming obligations are clear for the moment. New projected or persisted events will land here in chronological groups.

historyEmpty.title: No completed history yet.
historyEmpty.description: Paid events land here once they are completed, grouped by paid month so the ledger stays easy to trust at a glance.

events.historyGroupHint: Completed rows stay grouped by paid month, newest sections first.

adminNotice.title: {{count}} invalid projected history rows were hidden from this ledger.
adminNotice.description: These pre-origin projected rows were suppressed so the ledger stays clean while you review the underlying item data.

manualOverride.description: Logged as an exceptional manual history entry. Review the date and amount against the source record.

error.title: We couldn't refresh the events ledger.
error.description: Check your connection, then retry to reload the latest ledger state.

markPaid.failed: Could not mark this row paid. Try again.
markPaid.acknowledged: Paid today. Moving this row into History.
markPaid.historyCatchingUp: Saved successfully. History is catching up in the background.

reconcile.title: Reconcile payment
reconcile.helper: Review the projected values and adjust if needed before saving.
reconcile.failed: Could not reconcile this row. Try again.

errors.amountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
errors.generic: Could not reconcile this row. Try again.

editAction.projectedConfirm: Saving this projected occurrence creates a persisted exception for this date.
editAction.persistedConfirm: Save changes to this persisted occurrence?
editAction.noChanges: No changes detected. Update the date or amount before saving.

followUp.title: Schedule the next date
followUp.description: This event can be scheduled for the next due date now.

items.title: Items
items.subtitle: {{total}} items in your working set
items.loadError: Items could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
items.empty: No items yet. Create an asset or commitment to begin.
items.emptyFiltered: No items match the active filters.

detail.loadError: Item details could not be loaded.
detail.summaryPeriodHint: Only rows due this {{cadencePeriod}} are included in the active period: {{period}}.
detail.summaryRuleHint: One-time rows count once only when their due date is inside this active period.
detail.summaryNetFormulaHint: Net cashflow is normalized income minus obligations for this monthly period.
detail.summaryNetFormulaHintCadence: Net cashflow due this {{cadencePeriod}} equals income due this {{cadencePeriod}} minus obligations due this {{cadencePeriod}}.
detail.noLinkedParent: This commitment currently stands on its own and is not linked to a parent item.

ledger.currentUpcomingEmpty: No current or upcoming ledger records for linked financial items.
ledger.historicalEmpty: No historical ledger records for linked financial items.
ledger.historicalCollapsedHint: Historical records are collapsed on mobile. Use Show historical records to expand.

historicalAction.title: Log completed historical entry
historicalAction.helper: Create a completed manual history entry for this financial item without leaving item detail.
historicalAction.warning: This manual override should be used only for exceptional historical entries that need to appear in completed history immediately.
historicalAction.noteOptional: Note is optional and only appears on manual override history rows.
historicalAction.success: Historical entry saved. Review it in History.
historicalAction.warningSaved: Saved with a warning. Review the note below, then close this dialog to continue.

errors.dateRequired: Choose a completed date before saving.
errors.amountRequired: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
errors.generic: Historical entry could not be saved. Try again.

detail.commitmentFallbackBody: This item type does not have net-status cards, but activity and edit workflows are available.

edit.title: Edit item
edit.loadError: This item could not be loaded for editing.
edit.customFieldExists: A field with that name already exists.

wizard.title: Create item
wizard.startingRemainingHint: If empty, tracking starts from current remaining/original principal when available.
wizard.startingCollectedHint: Defaults to 0. Completed income events are added on top.
wizard.parentRequired: Financial commitments require a parent asset.
wizard.requiredMissing: Please complete required fields before continuing.
wizard.customFieldExists: A field with that name already exists.
wizard.actorMissing: Select an active user before creating an item.
wizard.unlinkedWarningDescription: This financial item has no linked asset. You can continue, but confirm this intentional unlinked save.

deleteDialog.title: Delete item
deleteDialog.description: Delete {{itemLabel}}? This action is soft-delete and will refresh your list.

activity.undoError: Could not undo this event completion.

form.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page?
